title: Net Music: Better Login
description: A mod that provides a better login experience for Net Music.
body:
# Net Music: Better Login

Provides a better login experience and VIP song playback for the Net Music mod.

### How does it compare to NetMusic: LoginNeed?

|                   | LoginNeed                                       | Better Login                                                              |
|-------------------|-------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Login Methods     | Manual Cookie Entry                             | Manual Cookie Entry, QR Code Login, Email Login, SMS Verification Login   |
| Scope of Effect   | Only the logged-in user can listen to VIP songs | After server-side cookie configuration, all users can listen to VIP songs |
| Mod Compatibility | Compatible with NetMusic: Playlist Mod          | Compatible with TLM and Sophisticated Backpack mods                       |

> Clearly, this mod is not compatible with LoginNeed or the Playlist mod

### Usage Instructions

1. Type `/nmbl login` to open the login screen.
2. Log in using QR code login (recommended), email login, or SMS verification code login.
3. If you need to use Cookie login, set the `Cookie` field in the configuration
   file `config/netmusicbetterlogin-common.toml`,
   then enter the command `/nmbl server cookie reload` (this command requires admin privileges) to reload the Cookie.

> **Using in Multiplayer**
>
> For LAN multiplayer, only the host needs to log in.
>
> For dedicated servers (such as panel servers), after logging in on the client, you can use the client’s configuration
> file to overwrite the server’s configuration file (you can also manually copy and paste the cookie into the server’s
> configuration file),
> then enter the command `/nmbl server cookie reload` to reload the cookie.

### Commands

#### Client-Only Commands

- `/nmbl login` Opens the login screen.

#### General Commands (Requires admin privileges)

- `/nmbl server cookie reload` Reloads the cookie.
- `/nmbl server cookie clear` Clears the cookie.
- `/nmbl server level` Displays the current maximum audio quality.
- `/nmbl server level set <level>` Sets the maximum audio quality.

### Security Notice

Your Netease Cloud Music cookies are stored in this mod’s configuration file. Do not disclose your cookies to others, as
this may result in account theft. If your account is compromised or banned,
this mod assumes no liability. Please ensure the security of your account.

### Q&A

**Q: Why does the email login/SMS verification login prompt indicate a security risk?**

A: This is due to Netease Cloud Music’s risk control measures. We recommend using QR code login instead.

**Q: Why can’t I listen to VIP songs even after logging in successfully (songs with links starting with ... cannot be
found)?**

A: Refer to the **Using in Multiplayer Games** section in the Usage Guide to ensure you are logged in correctly.
